parameters.jsCode:
const ai = $input.first().json;
const stats = $('📈 Tổng hợp số liệu').first().json;
const aiText = (ai.choices && ai.choices[0]) ? ai.choices[0].message.content : 'Khong the phan tich.';

const trendBSymbol = stats.trend_booking.includes('tang') ? '▲' : stats.trend_booking.includes('giam') ? '▼' : '→';
const trendRSymbol = stats.trend_revenue.includes('tang') ? '▲' : stats.trend_revenue.includes('giam') ? '▼' : '→';

const msg = [
  '📊 BAO CAO DOANH THU — ' + stats.client_name.toUpperCase(),
  '====================',
  '📅 Tuan: ' + stats.week_label,
  '',
  '🎯 TUAN NAY',
  '• Booking: ' + stats.week_bookings + ' luot ' + trendBSymbol + ' ' + stats.trend_booking,
  '• Doanh thu: ' + stats.fmt_week_revenue + ' ' + trendRSymbol + ' ' + stats.trend_revenue,
  '• Khach moi: ' + stats.week_new_customers + ' nguoi',
  '• Top dich vu: ' + stats.top_services_week,
  '',
  '📆 30 NGAY GAN NHAT',
  '• Booking: ' + stats.month_bookings + ' luot',
  '• Doanh thu: ' + stats.fmt_month_revenue,
  '• Top dich vu: ' + stats.top_services_month,
  '====================',
  '🧠 NHAN XET AI:',
  aiText,
  '====================',
  'AgentWell Revenue Report — Thu 2'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { message: msg, telegram_chat_id: stats.telegram_chat_id } }];
